name: pr-source contract validator rejects a fragility_tier outside high medium low enum
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus/sources && printf 'sources:\n  - {id: x, name: x, github: x/y, tier: 1, source_class: financial-industry, applies_to: [node], fetch_frequency: daily, authority_tier: 1, fragility_tier: extreme}\n' > pr-corpus/sources/internal.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-source-contract.sh" --registry pr-corpus/sources/internal.yaml --tier plugin 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_fragility_tier=extreme' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
